    "Supply air short-circuiting directly into the return air path, bypassing the occupied zone."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-evaluate diffuser and return grille placement or adjust air balancing dampers and terminal unit settings to prevent short-circuiting.",

  "rationale": "Supply air short-circuiting to the return air path prevents proper thermal conditioning and ventilation of the occupied space, violating SMACNA guidelines and failing to meet the design criteria specified in the TAB report.",
